d7b_reasoning: The strategy demonstrates coherent internal logic: entry requires volume_zscore_24h > 2.0 (exceptional volume), price above sma_50 (uptrend), positive return_24h > 0.01, and rsi_14 > 52 (mild momentum confirmation). However, structural variant risk is very high: the factor set {close, return_1h, return_24h, rsi_14, sma_50, volume_zscore_24h} matches prior entry #9 exactly. This represents a parametric variant rather than a structurally novel hypothesis, as the fundamental factor combination has already been explored in this batch.
